comparison_note: healthy_max is reported alongside p99 to expose ML's threshold-rule sensitivity; it does NOT replace the pre-committed healthy_p99 primary rule.
rule_description: Frozen BEFORE measuring lead-time: ML_THRESHOLD = 99th percentile of the anomaly_score over the HEALTHY window (idx 0..299). Pre-committed; NOT chosen to maximize ML lead-time (anti-circularity, the D-05 parallel).
